title: HOME SCHOOL SERVICES - 211info
text: HARNEY COUNTY EDUCATION SERVICE DISTRICT HOME SCHOOL SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides licensing, information and resources for home school teaching. 25 Fairview Heights Loop Box 460 Burns, OR 97720 Eligibility: A parent whose child is 7 years old on or before September 1 and who is to be home schooled must notify the local Education Service District of their intent within 10 days of beginning to home school or withdrawing their child from public or private school. Call or visit website for more information. Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 573-2122 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 573-2122 Main phone Main phone (541) 573-2122 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for information. FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Harney County Services: Alternative Education * Homeschooling Issues Other Services Offered At This Location: EDUCATIONAL INSTITUTIONS/SCHOOLS - EDUCATION SERVICE DISTRICT EDUCATIONAL INSTITUTIONS/SCHOOLS - FRONTIER EARLY LEARNING HUB EDUCATIONAL SUPPORT SERVICES - SPECIAL EDUCATION PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - PRESCHOOL PROMISE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. HARNEY COUNTY EDUCATION SERVICE DISTRICT
